chapter_title.en: Self-reflection and contentment in Islamic teachings

text: وَمَنْ نَظَرَ فِي عُيُوبِ النَّاسِ فَأَنْكَرَهَا ثُمَّ رَضِيَهَا لِنَفْسِهِ فذَاك الْأَحْمَقُ بِعَيْنِهِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: He who observes the shortcomings of others and disapproves of them and then accepts them for himself is definitely a fool.
